name: magazine73
description: Frontend build tooling for the Magazine73 WordPress plugin.

scripts.i18n:pot: php wp-cli.phar i18n make-pot plugin/magazine73 plugin/magazine73/languages/magazine73.pot --domain=magazine73 --exclude=third-party,assets/dist,vendor,languages && php wp-cli.phar i18n make-pot assets/src plugin/magazine73/languages/magazine73-js.pot --domain=magazine73 --include='*.js' && php wp-cli.phar i18n make-pot plugin/magazine73 plugin/magazine73/languages/magazine73.pot --domain=magazine73 --exclude=third-party,assets/dist,vendor,languages --merge=plugin/magazine73/languages/magazine73-js.pot
scripts.i18n:json: php wp-cli.phar i18n make-json plugin/magazine73/languages/magazine73-es_ES.po plugin/magazine73/languages --no-purge --use-map=plugin/magazine73/languages/i18n-map.json && msgfmt -o plugin/magazine73/languages/magazine73-es_ES.mo plugin/magazine73/languages/magazine73-es_ES.po
